violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. After observing no soap for the hand sink in the kitchen, I asked what employees use for soap and I was directed to the restroom next to the kitchen and told they usually use that sink. Restroom sink should only be used for washing hands after using the restroom. Kitchen hand washing sink should be used for all other hand washing.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in cooler shelves were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Handwashing sink in the kitchen does not have soap. Handwashing sinks should be supplied with soap at all times.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Kitchen floor was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Bucket of pizza sauce and a pizza were found in the reach-in cooler with sliding glass doors, uncovered. Food items should be protected from contamination.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of refrigerated units were found dirty during inspection. Refrigerated units should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the hood ventilation system were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand washing sink. Soap and paper towels should be available at hand washing sinks all times. Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Billard/pool balls were found in the basin of the hand washing sink. Hand washing sinks should be easily accessible for washing hands.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Kitchen floor was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
